chunks.title: Mountain Goats and Deer
chunks.reason: God questions Job about the birth cycles of mountain goats and deer.

chunks.title: The Wild Donkey
chunks.reason: God describes the wild donkey's freedom in the desert.

chunks.title: The Wild Ox
chunks.reason: God questions Job about taming the wild ox for labor.

chunks.title: The Ostrich
chunks.reason: God describes the ostrich's unique and seemingly foolish parenting.

chunks.title: The War Horse
chunks.reason: God details the horse's strength and courage in battle.

chunks.title: The Hawk and Eagle
chunks.reason: God describes the soaring flight and hunting prowess of birds of prey.
